title: {YTP} ~ You're Mad, Dishcord
description:
Use this new converter, they said. The videos won't look pixelated at all, they said.

Admittedly there is no theme with this one. Some music videos I'd been waiting to make jokes with.

THROWBACK: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cZBoMR4fFCc

Songs (In order):
*You're So Vain - Carly Simon
**Bangarang - Skrillex
*Discord (Remix) - The Living Tombstone
**Disco1 - The Sims House Party
*Dishes - Flynn Adam
*Mad World (Cover) - Gary Jules
